---
title: Useful resources
---

## Raster background maps

Copy the urls below and put them in the Browser Panel in QGIS to add them as XYZ Tiles - click on the XYZ Tiles heading to expand it, then right-click and choose "New Connection". Paste the URL in the URL field, give it a name, and click OK.

- OpenStreetMap: https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png
- Bing Maps (Imagery): http://ecn.t3.tiles.virtualearth.net/tiles/a{q}.jpeg?g=1   
- Google Satellite: https://mt1.google.com/vt/lyrs=s&x={x}&y={y}&z={z}
- Google Maps: https://mt1.google.com/vt/lyrs=m&x={x}&y={y}&z={z}
- Google Hybrid: https://mt1.google.com/vt/lyrs=y&x={x}&y={y}&z={z}
- Google Terrain: https://mt1.google.com/vt/lyrs=p&x={x}&y={y}&z={z}

## Vector tile background maps

- OpenStreetMap (via ESRI): https://basemaps.arcgis.com/arcgis/rest/services/OpenStreetMap_v2/VectorTileServer  

## ArcGIS REST Server Data

- Victorian Government Data VicMap Lite: https://services-ap1.arcgis.com/P744lA0wf4LlBZ84/arcgis/rest/services/Vicmap_Lite/FeatureServer
